description: TJRTrades discusses his unexpected rise in the crypto space, touching on day trading, meme coins, and the impact of social media on market movements. He shares insights on transactions and the challenges of trading lesser-known coins.
topic_summary: In this interview, TJRTrades explores the dynamics of crypto trading, including the influence of social media platforms like TikTok and Twitter on market trends. He reflects on his experiences with meme coins and the complexities of trading in a volatile environment [t=0:24].
